title: How to get the month name from a date
task: Turn a date into its month name, like "July", for reports and labels.

libreoffice.note: LibreOffice format codes are case-insensitive here; "mmmm" also works.

explanation: TEXT formats a value using a format code: "mmmm" is the full month name, "mmm" the abbreviation, and "mm" the two-digit month number. The result is text, so it stays put when sorted or concatenated. Month names follow the spreadsheet's language setting — on a French locale you'd get "juillet".
